title: Arrabidaea whitei
taxonomy: Arrabidaea whitei is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, commonly known as the trumpet vine or catalpa family. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, with over 800 species worldwide. Arrabidaea whitei is further classified within the genus Arrabidaea, which includes several species of flowering plants native to Central and South America. The genus Arrabidaea is part of the tribe Bignonieae, a group of flowering plants known for their showy, trumpet-shaped flowers. Overall, the classification of Arrabidaea whitei reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants in the Bignoniaceae family.
